-#

-# Test coverage:
-#   - `ru --json review --dry-run` emits valid discovery JSON on stdout

-#   - gh auth prerequisite failure returns exit code 3

-set -uo pipefail

-SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

-TESTS_PASSED=0
-TESTS_FAILED=0
-TEMP_DIR=""

-if [[ -t 1 ]]; then
-    RED='\033[0;31m'
